name: Scary Siam Mall
short_description: Scary Siam Mall is a horror game in Tha Song Mueang Plaza shopping mall. atmosphere and scary
detailed_description:
Mountain Driving


About the Game

Scary Siam Mall is a horror game in Tha Song Mueang Plaza shopping mall. atmosphere and scary

Thai style ghost game in a shopping mall


This game is developed by Krit Bualad

Interesting Feature

  • This game requires you to find keys to unlock doors.
  • Ghosts run after us, don't come near them.
  • The next mission will go through forests and tunnels.
  • There are more batteries flashlight to collect.
  • Find the 6 digit number to unlock the door.

supported_languages:
English, French, German, Greek, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Dutch, Turkish, Norwegian, Finnish, Russian, Swedish, Arabic, Hungarian, Korean, Czech, Danish, Vietnamese, Portuguese - Brazil, Polish, Romanian, Thai*, Italian, Spanish - Spain
